outfit_info.outfit_description: This casual urban look features a black graphic t-shirt paired with light wash, wide-leg denim. A distressed grey hoodie is styled around the waist, complementing the black chunky sneakers for a relaxed yet edgy aesthetic.

model_attributes.body: A slender, male physique conveying an effortless and modern casual demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing relaxed and neutral, with hands by sides, presenting the outfit directly.
model_attributes.background: A clean, minimalistic light gray studio backdrop providing clear focus on the attire.

outfit.P01010154: black cotton I Love Paris T-shirt
